description_long: This muffin features a vibrant magenta wrapper with a smooth, swirled pink frosting on top, adorned with small black sprinkles. The frosting is topped with two bright red strawberries, each with a green leafy crown, and a single rectangular biscuit or wafer. The muffin sits in a deep, cup-like wrapper that is slightly faceted, giving it a stylized, geometric appearance. The strawberries and biscuit are arranged asymmetrically, adding visual interest and a playful touch. The overall look is whimsical and appetizing, with a focus on bold colors and simple, cartoon-like forms.
description: A stylized muffin with pink swirled frosting, strawberries, a biscuit, and a magenta wrapper. The design is colorful and playful with geometric shapes.
description_view_0: The muffin is seen with two strawberries, one on top and one at the side, and a biscuit embedded in the frosting. The magenta wrapper and pink frosting are clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front strawberry at the base and the biscuit, with the frosting swirl and wrapper in full view.
description_view_2: The muffin is shown with the biscuit and a single strawberry on top, while another strawberry is visible at the side. The swirl of the frosting is prominent.
description_view_3: Only one strawberry is visible on top, with the biscuit behind it. The magenta wrapper and pink frosting dominate the view.
